Bug / Task Description: Adding an edge fails to reject edges that would introduce a multi-hop cycle, silently corrupting the acyclic invariant. The internal reachability search used for cycle detection never reports success once it steps past the starting node, so a path like c -> ... -> a is not recognized as making a -> c a back-edge. Direct self-loops are still rejected, masking the defect.
Commit Subject: fix(dag): detect target during reachability descent
